center.name: Mount Timolan Protected Landscape
center.summary: Mount Timolan Protected Landscape是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括菲律賓皺盔犀鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like Mount Apo, Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Timolan Protected Landscape and Mount Kitanglad but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax
